subject: WM-0095 ready for review
body: Addressed changes_requested: consolidation now fails unless benchmark baselinePath is packages/benchmarks/baseline.json, artifactPath is coordination/artifacts/WM-0095/benchmarks/benchmark-results.json, and every comparison keeps warn/fail thresholds exactly 10/20. Regenerated WM-0095 consolidation artifact and SHA-256 sidecar; consolidation, taskctl validate, git diff --check and pnpm quality pass.
